form.formComment: Nearing another win after his success on February 2 at this track over 300m. Last start was third over 300m in 16.94, behind Little Bullet. Thereabouts and rates well in this. Expected to run well.

form.formComment: Comes off a (16.95) win last time, scoring by a neck in a Grade 6 over 300m at this track. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Makes strong appeal.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 352m at Q Lakeside. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked on the home turn; Gave ground and trailed the field.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (16.82) in a Grade 5, finishing a 0.8 lengths third. Has three successes and five minors from 10 starts from box 4. Others rate better this time.
